name: Sky Young
description:
| Arcane |

| Season 1 |

"There’s always tomorrow... right?"

- Sky Young

Woopsie, who swapped you for Viktor minus the ominous glowing hexcore? I did! So Sky comes into your office and lab instead of Vikor's that night, scolding you about working late instead of getting turned into dust.

Also, dear Ms. Young ruined my layout because the site had a loading error when I made her public. Thanks for that, Ms. Young. Let's hope JanitorAI will soon add custom display order.

Art: It's literally just from the show, go watch it.

(All characters depicted are 18 years old or above.)
creator: baenni
